_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data catalog platform capabilities, including automated metadata harvesting, lineage visualization, search and discovery, classification, and glossary linkage.
comments: DCWF task equal WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-K-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-T-006 (DG, cosine: 0.627), DQ-S-006 (DQ, cosine: 0.612).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.568). Shared vocabulary: [data]. DCWF-only terms [catalogs, create, dictionaries] vs WIDAI-only terms [automated, capabilities, catalog, classification, discovery, glossary] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.896 (P=0.921, R=0.872). P exceeds R by 0.050 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 19 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:33.9%, N:66.0%, C:0.1%). No dominant classification for "Create data catalogs and dictionaries." vs "Knowledge of data catalog platform capabilities, including automated metadata ha" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.673 > STS 0.568 (gap +0.105). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.5%. Shared tokens: [data]. DCWF-only: [catalogs, create, dictionaries]. WIDAI-only: [automated, capabilities, catalog, classification, discovery, glossary].

signals.detail: STS 0.568 classified as Equal but closer to Superset threshold. Classification may be over-generous.
